title: canarium sarawakanum
intro: Canarium sarawakanum, a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae, is native to Borneo and is commonly known as the Sarawak canarium or Borneo canarium tree. The plant's medicinal properties include its leaves, which contain a variety of bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and alkaloids, that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Canarium sarawakanum are believed to provide several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and skin conditions. In traditional medicine, the leaves of the Canarium sarawakanum plant are prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by boiling the leaves in water to release their medicinal properties.
